stdout_tail: - Kept normal recall behavior hydrated on successful paths.
- Tightened daemon tests to match actual normal-path semantic hydration and degraded-only signaling.
- Fixed stale CLI e2e test invocations from deprecated `encode`/`explain` to current `remember`/`why`.
- Normal semantic queries now stay on the hydrated success path when matching runtime/persisted memories exist.
- Degraded summaries are only asserted on clearly degraded cases.
- Persisted reload + exact-id + semantic + empty-result coverage all pass in the targeted slice.
- There’s still an existing warning about unused `persisted_memory_count` in `crates/membrain-daemon/src/daemon.rs`, but I left that out of scope.
